texto: There is a time for faith, Bishop, and a time for action. It would be a foolish man who stood on a battlefield and faced an army with a Bible in his hands. We are here to do the bidding of our Lord Almighty, but it is through deeds, as well as piety, that we serve Him.
explicacao: Citação de Robyn Young sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “There is a time for faith, Bishop, and a time for action. It would be a foolish man who stood on …” articula fe, fact, intelligence em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como intelligence e logic.
